global_description: Medium-sized primate with a flexible, elongated body, covered in fur, typically brown or gray. It has a long, prehensile tail, expressive face with prominent eyes, and dexterous limbs with opposable thumbs.

part_details.head: Expressive with prominent eyes and a short snout
part_details.body: Elongated and flexible, covered in fur
part_details.tail: Long and prehensile, used for grasping
part_details.fur: Typically brown or gray, covering the body

spatial_relations: Limbs attached to sides of body
